texto: Green Arrow has gone through so many changes; he's been right-wing, he's been left-wing, he's been rich, he's been poor, he's been a social justice guy, then when I got him, he was a rich playboy guy. So it was a lot harder to get into a character that has so many personas in the past, and I just looked at his anger.
explicacao: Citação de Ann Nocenti sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Green Arrow has gone through so many changes; he's been right-wing, he's been left-wing, he's bee…” articula sucesso, character, justice em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e justice.
